title: Retiring Samurai
overview: Gymnast Jotaro Aragaki is told by his coach to retire, but he can't bring himself to tell his family.

title: Rock-Bottom Samurai
overview: After the press conference where he failed to announce his retirement, Jotaro has to figure out his next steps.

title: Dueling Samurai
overview: Young up-and-coming gymnast, Tetsuo Minamino, challenges Jotaro to a gymnastics duel with Jōtarō's career on the line.

title: Samurai Daughter.
overview: As Jotaro works hard to prepare for the NHK Cup, Leo notices that Rei has been acting strange, so he tries to find out what's wrong.

title: Battling Samurai
overview: It's time for the NHK Cup, Jotaro's first official competition after his press conference, but all eyes are on the young gymnasts he's competing against.

title: Samurai Father and Daughter
overview: Rei's birthday is coming up, but with Jotaro busy preparing for the joint training camp with China, she is left alone to face her feelings.

title: Training Camp Samurai
overview: At the joint training camp with China, Jotaro and the other Japanese gymnasts see the powerful gymnastics of the Chinese team firsthand.

title: Intensive Training Samurai
overview: Kitty comes to visit Rei in Japan and takes her on a shopping spree. Meanwhile, Jotaro works on his quadruple with the help of Leo.

title: Ninja & Samurai
overview: As All-Japan draws near, Jotaro practices hard to perfect his new move in time for the competition, but he has an unexpected setback.

title: Samurai's Decisive Battle
overview: Jotaro is determined to show Leo the new move that Leo helped him complete, but as the competition starts, Leo is nowhere to be found.

title: Gymnastics Samurai
overview: All eyes are on Jotaro on the day of the All-Japan finals, but Leo is already on his way to the airport to go back to London.
